updateContainer.title: Update Container

updateContainer.versionUpdateNewTips: Version updates may result in the loss of data generated within the container. It is recommended to configure the 'volume' settings for the container to retain the data to NAS.
updateContainer.versionUpdateTips: Please be aware that version updates may have the following impacts
updateContainer.tips1: 1. If the old and new versions of the image are incompatible, the container running will be affected after the update. Therefore, you are advised to obtain details about the update from the image publisher
updateContainer.tips2: 2. Version update will keep the data in the container "Volume", and the data outside the "Volume" will be lost
updateContainer.tips3: 3. If the container image to be updated is used by other containers at the same time, these containers will be affected by the preceding two projects
updateContainer.backUpContainerErr: Please select the original container for backup

updateConfirmation.context:
The system will pull the latest image of the original version number and create a container with the original configuration. In this period:
1. Please confirm the latest image configuration with the image publisher in advance, as any configuration changes may affect container operation
2. Please do not restart or shut down the NAS device or the "Docker" app
3. Please do not change the registry and proxy information
4. Data not mounted to the NAS might be lost
5. Containers will stop running
updateConfirmation.disableUpdates: If you want to disable update reminders permanently, you can set in "{updateReminder}"
updateConfirmation.tips: {0} containers can be updated|{0} container can be updated|{0} containers can be updated

dataMigration.context1: (If the migrated volume is deleted, the docker data will be re-stored under the initial volume.)

riskWarning.title: Note
riskWarning.context: Data migration may cause some images to fail (unable to create containers or associated containers running abnormally), but will not affect the files mapped to NAS.

mirrorUpdate.label: Image update
mirrorUpdate.modificationConfirmationText: The current settings have been modified. Leaving this page will result in the loss of your changes
mirrorUpdate.tips1: The system periodically checks whether new images are available for projects and containers, and notifies about updates in the list
mirrorUpdate.tips2: The system will regularly update projects and containers with new images according to the schedule. Update records can be viewed in logs
mirrorUpdate.updatePlannedContext:
The system will regularly update projects and containers with new images according to the schedule. During the update, the latest image of the original version will be pulled and redeployed with the original configuration. In this period:
1. Please confirm the latest image configuration with the image publisher in advance, as any configuration changes may affect project/container operation;
2. Projects/Containers may stop running or experience brief interruptions;
3. Data not mounted to the NAS may be lost;
4. Updates may fail due to network or registry issues;
5. Please do not restart or shut down the NAS device or the "Docker" app, or change registry or proxy information

applicationProtocol.title: Disclaimer
applicationProtocol.context:
The "Docker" app only provides the capabilities of the official Docker base components. Users are solely responsible for container configuration, usage, and any associated risks. These risks include, but are not limited to, the following scenarios:
•Malicious processes within containers may compromise the host system, leading to data loss or system crashes.
•Exposing the host to public networks may increase the risk of cyberattacks.
•Personal or sensitive data may be at risk of leakage.
Usage guidelines:
•SSH terminal operations are not recommended: It is advised to avoid using SSH terminals for Docker management. Instead, use the graphical interface to minimize permission-related issues and data inconsistencies.
•Directory mounting and storage migration: Please be caution to modify shared folder storage locations in "Files". Changing the storage path of a mounted folder may cause container malfunctions.
•Image pulling: Users in mainland China may experience slow or failed image downloads. To resolve this, configure an image registry or proxy in setting images.
•Hard drive hibernation: Docker usage may affect hard drive hibernation, depending on the running containers and their activity levels.
Privacy notice:
If you choose to configure a registry or use the image service to enhance Docker image pulling, please note that the image provider or registry may collect your information, including IP address, NAS device model, operating system, and operation logs. These data may be used by the provider to improve services or optimize your experience. By proceeding with registry configuration or image pulling, you acknowledge and consent to the potential data sharing.
Before using the "Docker" app, please carefully read the above disclaimer, usage guidelines, and privacy notice to ensure a full understanding of the risks and operational considerations. By using the app, you confirm that you have read, understood, and agreed to these terms.

projectItem.secondaryPopupContent:
The system will pull the latest image of the original version number and update projects with the original configuration. In this period:
1. Please confirm the latest image configuration with the image publisher in advance, as any configuration changes may affect container operation
2. Please do not restart or shut down the NAS device or the "Docker" app
3. Please do not change registry or proxy information
4. Data not mounted to the NAS might be lost
5. Projects will stop running
